Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8028 "DIZZYDOWNTHERAPIDS-0400-8028" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dizzy - Down the Rapids.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Spectrum version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
